---
title: "About"
---

-   Welcome to the Single Cell RNA-seq Workshop website.
-   Below you will find the core information for the workshop.
-   More detailed information can be found under the 'Syllabus' link.
-   The workshop schedule can be found under the 'Schedule' header.
-   Lecture slides will be posted under the 'Lectures' header.
-   Hands-on exercises are under the 'Exercises' header.
-   Additional resources are under the 'Resources' header.

## Instructor information

|            |                      |
|------------|----------------------|
| Instructor | *Instructor name*    |
| Office     | *Office location*    |
| e-mail     | *instructor\@email*  |

## Workshop information

|                    |                       |
|--------------------|-----------------------|
| Dates              | *Workshop dates*      |
| Location           | *Room / virtual link* |
| Office Hours       | *Day & time*          |

## Online Resources

-   This website ([*workshop URL here*]()) hosts the schedule, syllabus, slides, and exercises.
-   *Add links to Slack / Discord / shared drive / etc. as needed.*

## Technical Requirements

-   Laptop with current operating system
-   Current version of R ([install here](https://www.r-project.org))
-   Current version of RStudio ([install here](https://www.rstudio.org))
-   A terminal with `ssh` (for cluster access, if applicable)
